name: RLI CORP
summary: PARTI RLI Corp. was founded in 1965. References to the Company, we, our, us or like terms refer to the business of RLI Corp. and its subsidiaries. We underwrite select property, casualty and surety products through major subsidiaries collectively known as RLI Insurance Group. We conduct operations through three insurance companies.
